- 修复 WebDAV 同文件夹多集视频无法连续自动播放的问题
- 修复 WebDAV 视频播放后浏览页不显示播放进度和高亮的问题
- 修复 WebDAV 浏览出错后返回键卡死无法退出的问题

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fix WebDAV multi-episode folders only loading the clicked video instead of the full playlist
- Fix WebDAV browse screen not showing playback progress indicator and recently played highlight
- Fix back navigation getting stuck when WebDAV directory listing fails with an error

</details>
